CVE-2020-14940.title: An issue was discovered in io/gpx/GPXDocumentReader.java in TuxGu ...
CVE-2020-14940.description: An issue was discovered in io/gpx/GPXDocumentReader.java in TuxGuitar 1.5.4. It uses misconfigured XML parsers, leading to XXE while loading GP6 (.gpx) and GP7 (.gp) tablature files.
